action_set_definitions.name: get_listing_queue
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current list of pending product listings from the environment.

action_set_definitions.name: get_seller_profile
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves information about the seller of a specific listing, including their tier and trust multiplier.

listing_id.description: The ID of the listing to check.

action_set_definitions.name: run_risk_assessment
action_set_definitions.description: Executes multi-modal ensemble scoring to detect risk vectors (weapons, box-only scams) and returns the baseline risk score and category-specific overrides.

listing_id.description: The ID of the listing to analyze.

action_set_definitions.name: get_operational_thresholds
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current risk threshold values from the Operational Handbook.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_moderation_decision
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the status of a listing in the system and moves it out of the queue.

listing_id.description: The ID of the listing to moderate.

state_description.listing_queue: An ordered list of product objects currently awaiting moderation, each containing id, title, description, and category.
state_description.moderation_history: A mapping of listing_ids to their final moderation status (e.g., 'approved', 'rejected', 'escalated') and the reason provided.
state_description.system_stats: Counters for the session, including total_processed and remaining_in_queue.
state_description.active_listing_id: The ID of the listing currently being viewed or locked by the moderator.

listing_queue.title: Graphic Card Packaging - RTX 4080
listing_queue.description: This is the original BOX ONLY for collectors. No hardware included. Mint condition.

listing_queue.title: Brand New Replica Sneaker - 1:1 Quality
listing_queue.description: Highest grade replica available. All logos present. Shipping worldwide.

listing_queue.title: Tactical Deployment Blade
listing_queue.description: Spring-loaded for emergency use. 4-inch reinforced steel.

listing_queue.title: Industrial Grade Pipe Connector
listing_queue.description: Heavy-duty steel pipe segment for specialized hydraulic systems.
